description.value: Aura faint evocation; CL 1st; Slot head; Price 900 gp; Weight â DESCRIPTION This small cloth skullcap resembles those some priests wear, but is topped with a small silver statue in the shape of a lit candle. The wearer can command the statue to radiate light (as light ). The light can also be turned off on command. CONSTRUCTION REQUIREMENTS Feats Craft Wondrous Item, light; Cost 450 gp.
